summary: Built enterprise web applications using Spring Boot, React, Thymeleaf, and PostgreSQL. Delivered software modules for Indian Oil Corporation's Swadyamitra platform and the Gate Pass Management System. Designed portfolio websites and custom web solutions using Hugo, GatsbyJS, and modern frontend technologies. Developing AI-powered products and maker-focused hardware prototypes.

Engineering a cloud-native platform from the ground up, building both frontend and backend using modern web technologies. Designed the application architecture, database schema, REST APIs, and authentication system. Built automated CI/CD pipelines and deployed services on Google Cloud Platform (Cloud Run). Developing AI-powered solutions focused on political intelligence and analytics.

Developed Python-based RPA solutions for automating financial reporting and Xero invoice processing. Built automation workflows for Cedar Hill Prep School and enterprise hospitality clients. Enhanced and maintained automation systems integrated with Oracle Financials for hotel operations. Improved operational efficiency by automating repetitive business processes.

Designed, developed, and maintained institutional websites using WordPress, Hugo, and GatsbyJS. Managed the organization's Microsoft 365 environment and IT infrastructure. Taught undergraduate courses in Internet of Things, Cloud Computing, Virtualization, and Cybersecurity. Coordinated the Google Cloud Career Advancement Program and AICTE LITE Pupilfirst Web Development Minor Program.

Developed backend services using Java, Spring MVC, REST APIs, and React. Implemented search and indexing solutions using Elasticsearch and MongoDB. Optimized application performance through efficient algorithms and data structures. Integrated enterprise services using JSON-based REST APIs.

Designed an AI-assisted phishing detection platform for Microsoft Outlook. Developed threat intelligence tools for collecting, analyzing, and visualizing cybersecurity data. Built machine learning pipelines for email classification and threat analysis. Collaborated with the Chief Information Security Office on enterprise cybersecurity initiatives.

Developed and maintained applications for the New Hampshire Employment Security unemployment insurance system. Implemented policy updates and resolved production issues using Java, Spring, Hibernate, and JPA. Improved application accessibility and modernized legacy components. Supported secure government services used by employers and claimants across [New Hampshire](https://nhuis.nh.gov/claimant/).

Developed modules for the Integrated Test Data Management (ITDM) platform. Automated test data generation and management across multiple environments. Built proof-of-concept enterprise applications using Java, Spring, Hibernate, Struts, and SQL. Completed intensive enterprise training in Java technologies, design patterns, and software engineering.
